_comment: Simple 2-input AND gate configured in one LUT
_explanation: This configures a single CLB's LUT A as a 2-input AND gate.
The truth table has 16 entries (4-input LUT), but only I0 and I1 matter.
Index 3 (binary 0011, I0=1 I1=1) is the only entry set to 1.
All other entries are 0 because AND only outputs 1 when both inputs are 1.
